broadcasts.message:
PHASE 1 DISCOVERY COMPLETE: I've mapped the entire codebase structure. 

KEY FINDINGS:
- MONOREPO: Turborepo structure with 3 apps (web/Next.js, docs/Next.js, landing/Astro)
- ELEARNING: WordPress static export with Elementor theme (crafto), containing HTML/CSS/JS
- LANDING APP: Astro-based with existing brand system and components

BRAND COLORS EXTRACTED (from landing/global.css):
PRIMARY: #528aed (brand-blue), #4c6ce1 (brand-indigo), #a67bf4 (brand-purple)
ACCENT: #febb37 (brand-gold), #fb7a4b (brand-orange), #f96c54 (brand-coral)  
DARK: #486ae0 (brand-blue-dark), #34354f (brand-navy)

FONTS DOCUMENTED:
- Inter (body) - 400, 500, 600 weights
- Plus Jakarta Sans (headings) - 500, 600, 700 weights

LANDING STRUCTURE:
- 30+ Astro components (Navbar, Footer, Hero, Cards, etc.)
- i18n support (en/pt/es)
- Tailwind CSS with custom brand theme
- Layout.astro as base wrapper

ELEARNING SECTIONS IDENTIFIED:
1. Hero section with stats (tutors/students/courses counters)
2. About section with 3-column features
3. Popular courses grid (6 courses)
4. CTA section
5. Header with navigation mega-menu
6. Footer with gradient

Ready to proceed to Phase 2: Agent Coordination Strategy.

QUEEN ORCHESTRATION MODE ACTIVATED - EXECUTING ALL PHASES NON-STOP

Phase 1 ✓ COMPLETE
Phase 2 → STARTING NOW - Spawning specialized agents for section-by-section analysis
Phase 3 → QUEUED - Implementation will begin immediately after Phase 2
Phase 4 → QUEUED - QA validation will execute sequentially

All agents maintain retroactive communication. No user approval needed. Working non-stop until completion.

PHASE 3 IN PROGRESS - Component Implementation Started

✅ COMPLETED:
- HeroStats.astro (matches elearning hero counters: 260+ Tutors, 5340+ Students, 280+ Courses)
- FeaturesGrid.astro (matches elearning 3-column features: Flexible schedule, Pocket friendly, Expert Instructor)

🔄 IN PROGRESS:
- Creating CoursesGrid.astro (6-course responsive grid)
- Creating TestimonialsCarousel.astro (carousel-style-17)
- Updating Header component to match elearning structure
- Updating Footer with gradient background

📊 RETROACTIVE STATUS:
- All brand colors preserved (#528aed, #4c6ce1, #a67bf4, etc.)
- All fonts preserved (Inter body, Plus Jakarta Sans headings)
- Layout and CSS behavior matching elearning reference
- Components are portable and reusable across landing pages

⚠️ LSP ERRORS DETECTED: Existing i18n type mismatches (not related to refactor)

PHASE 2 BEGIN: Executing refactor plan for /apps/landing. Creating 8 new/updated sections: Header (Navbar.astro), Hero, About, Courses, Features, Testimonials, Blog, Footer. Brand colors and fonts MUST be preserved. Using /elearning HTML as reference. Starting parallel implementation now.
Phase 2 continuing - implementing Navbar mega-menu and Footer updates. All workers standby for task assignment.
